de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class ExecutionNodeSymbolicLayoutExtractor

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.AbstractUpdateExtractor
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicLayoutExtractor
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeSymbolicLayoutExtractor

  • public class ExecutionNodeSymbolicLayoutExtractor
extends SymbolicLayoutExtractor
    Special SymbolicLayoutExtractor for IExecutionNodes.
